footer.tagline: The Filipino auction marketplace. Bid, buy, and sell unique items.

hero.betaNotice: We're testing what works and gathering public interest.
hero.betaNoticeDetail: transactions are coordinated directly between buyers and sellers. Once we have enough traction, we'll integrate secure payments and become a full-blown bidding platform!
hero.tagline: Bid mo 'to! The Filipino way to bid, buy, and sell unique items
hero.subtitle: Join us in building the Philippines' most exciting auction platform. Your participation helps us understand what features matter most!

about.step1Desc: Sign up for free and join our beta community
about.step2Desc: Explore active auctions or list your own items
about.step3Desc: Bid on items you want - no payment needed yet
about.step4Desc: Winners chat with sellers to arrange payment & delivery
about.featuresSubtitle: Available now in our experimental phase
about.liveBiddingDesc: Real-time auction updates and competitive bidding
about.directMessagingDesc: Chat with buyers/sellers after winning bids
about.priceAnalyticsDesc: Track bidding trends and price history
about.smartSearchDesc: Find items by keywords, categories, and status
about.shapeFutureDesc: Your feedback directly influences what features we build next
about.betaBenefitsDesc: Early adopters get premium features when we launch officially
about.buildCommunityDesc: Connect with fellow Filipinos who love unique finds and good deals
about.growWithUsDesc: Be part of the journey from experimental platform to full marketplace
about.readyToBidSubtitle: Join us and help build something amazing for the Filipino community

products.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search or browse all products.
products.hideConfirm: Are you sure you want to hide "{title}"? It will no longer appear in browse results.
products.showConfirm: Are you sure you want to show "{title}"? It will appear in browse results again.

product.noBidsYet: No bids yet. Be the first to bid!
product.noBidsWaiting: No bids yet. Waiting for bidders...
product.productNotFoundDesc: The product you're looking for doesn't exist.
product.noBidsYetFirst: No bids yet - be the first!
product.mustLoginToBid: You must be logged in to place a bid
product.auctionEndedNoBids: This auction ended without any bids.
product.contactSellerArrange: Please contact the seller to arrange payment and delivery.
product.inactiveWarning: This product is currently inactive and hidden from Browse Products
product.confirmBidMessage: Are you sure you want to place this bid? This action cannot be undone.
product.hideFullName: Hide my full name (show only initials)
product.acceptBidWarning: Are you sure you want to accept this bid? This will close the auction and mark the item as SOLD. This action cannot be undone.
product.loginToBidMessage: You need to be logged in to place a bid on this product.
product.registerToBid: Don't have an account? Register now to start bidding!
product.reportThanks: Thank you for your report. Our team will review it shortly.
product.hideDescription: This item will be hidden from all users and moved to the Hidden Items tab. The seller will not be notified.
product.unhideDescription: This item will be restored and visible to all users again under Active Auctions.

sell.title: List Your Product
sell.subtitle: Create a new auction listing for your product
sell.mustBeLoggedIn: You must be logged in to create a listing
sell.provideAccurate: Make sure to provide accurate and detailed information
sell.setBidIncrement: Set an appropriate bid increment for your product
sell.chooseEndDate: Choose an appropriate auction end date

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Manage your products and purchases
dashboard.noActiveProductsDesc: You don't have any active products. Start selling now!
dashboard.noHiddenProductsDesc: You don't have any hidden products.
dashboard.noEndedAuctionsDesc: When your auctions end, they'll appear here.
dashboard.noPurchasesDesc: You haven't won any auctions yet. Start bidding to see your purchases here!
dashboard.hideDescription: This product will be hidden from the Browse Products page and won't be visible to other users. You can unhide it later from the Hidden tab.
dashboard.unhideDescription: This product will be restored and visible to all users again on the Browse Products page.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.selectConversation: Select a conversation to start messaging
inbox.noMessagesDesc: Your conversations with buyers and sellers will appear here.
inbox.voidDescription: You are requesting to void the transaction for {title}. The other party will need to approve this request.
inbox.voidApprovedDesc: The void request for {title} has been approved. As the seller, please choose what to do next:
inbox.restartBiddingDesc: Reopen the auction and let all bidders participate again
inbox.offerSecondBidderDesc: Give the second highest bidder a chance to purchase at their bid amount
inbox.purchaseOfferDesc: You have been offered the chance to purchase {title} as the second highest bidder!
inbox.originalWinnerVoided: The original winner has voided their purchase. Would you like to buy this item at your bid amount?

profile.title: Profile
profile.activityLimitsDesc: Track your usage of bidding and posting features
profile.bidLimitDesc: You can bid on up to {max} different products at a time.
profile.postLimitDesc: You can list up to {max} products for free.
profile.waitForAuctions: Wait for your auctions to end before bidding on new items.
profile.depositNeeded: To list more, you'll need to add a deposit (coming soon).
profile.comingSoonDesc: Deposit system to unlock unlimited bidding and posting capabilities. With a refundable deposit, you'll be able to bid on unlimited products and list unlimited items!
profile.unableToLoad: Unable to load your limits. Please try again later.

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.emptyDesc: Browse products and tap the heart icon to save items you're interested in.
